intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. 3:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 92% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. 3:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 3:00 at 92-92%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/15. 13 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 20% through session. Rep 2/15. You've done 3min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/15. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/3. 108%, 85-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 88%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 21% through session. Block 1/3. You've done 4min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 2:00 at 88%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 88% for 2:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 88% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 105%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 105% at 85-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 2:00 at 105%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 11 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 18 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 2:00 at 90%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 2:00 at 90%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. 90% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 9 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/3. 38% complete. Hold 92% steady. 37 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 38% complete. Block 2/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/3. 37 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 43% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 108% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 2min at 88%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 43% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 43% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 43% done. 108% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 44% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 34 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 29 minutes in. 88% at 85-95 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 44% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 7 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 44% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 88%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 32 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 31 minutes in. 105% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 30 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 33 minutes in. 90% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 90%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 25 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 40 minutes of threshold work done. Block 3/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 3/3. 61% complete. Hold 92% steady. 22 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 4 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. 22 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 3 reps left. 21 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. 108% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 43 minutes of work done. 21 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 12/15. Only 3 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 12/15. You've accumulated 23min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% complete. Block 3/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 24min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-95 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% complete. Block 3/3. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 19 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3: 2:00 at 88%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 2 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 blocks left. 17 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% through session. Block 3/3. You've done 26min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 46 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 3/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 90% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 90-90% FTP, 90-100 rpm. After this: 15min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 2:00 at 90%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 2:00 at 90%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 90% × 2:00. Give it everything. 15min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50 minutes of work done. 10 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 76% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
